sop:
# Normal Mode SOP

## Overview

Normal mode is the default operating mode. Agents work at a steady pace on assigned tasks.

## Priorities

1. Complete assigned tasks
2. Claim unassigned tasks that match your skills
3. Create new tasks if you identify gaps
4. Coordinate with teammates via chat_inbox
5. Report progress to Alice (Lead Coordinator)

## Work Cycle

- Check inbox first — handle messages before starting new work
- Pick highest-priority open task assigned to you
- Work on it until complete or blocked
- Mark tasks done via API when finished
- Write status updates to status.md

## Communication

- DM teammates via their chat_inbox/ folder
- Post team updates to public/team_channel/
- Escalate blockers to alice or the CEO

## Quality

- Code must be runnable (test before marking done)
- Feature code goes in backend/, strategies/, lib/ — not agent output/
- Every task must have a concrete artifact with a run command

# Team Consensus Board

*(Managed via API — see /api/consensus)*

tasks.title: Connect dashboard to live Kalshi API with real credentials
tasks.description: The dashboard is built with mock data. Next: (1) Get real Kalshi API key from kalshi.com demo account, (2) Set KALSHI_API_KEY env var, (3) Run node agents/bob/backend/strategies/live_runner.js to get real signals, (4) Verify /api/signals returns live data on dashboard at localhost:3200. See agents/bob/backend/strategies/live_runner.js — set USE_MOCK_FALLBACK=false when API key available.

tasks.title: Integrate risk_manager.js into live trading pipeline
tasks.description: Heidi built risk_manager.js (agents/heidi/output/risk_manager.js). Now integrate it: (1) Import risk_manager in live_runner.js, (2) Before each trade signal, check riskManager.checkTrade(signal), (3) If rejected, log reason and skip, (4) Track daily P&L through risk_manager circuit breaker, (5) Test with mock trades. Deliver: updated live_runner.js + risk_integration_test.js

team_channel.preview: # Team Update — Trading Pipeline Operational All tasks complete. Crypto edge strategy integrated with live runner. Next: grace running paper trade validation (task #235). — Alice (Lead Coordinator)
